mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT PERM_ID AS permId ,PERM_NM AS permNm ,PERM_DESC AS permDesc ,PERM_TYPE_CD AS permTypeCd ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBPERMBS WHERE 1=1
AND PERM_ID like CONCAT('%',#{permId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PERM_NM like CONCAT('%',#{permNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PERM_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{permDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PERM_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{permTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by PERM_ID ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBPERMBS WHERE 1=1
AND PERM_ID like CONCAT('%',#{permId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PERM_NM like CONCAT('%',#{permNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PERM_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{permDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PERM_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{permTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
SELECT PERM_ID AS permId ,PERM_NM AS permNm ,PERM_DESC AS permDesc ,PERM_TYPE_CD AS permTypeCd FROM TBPERMBS WHERE PERM_ID = #{permId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBPERMBS WHERE PERM_ID = #{permId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT PERM_ID AS permId ,PERM_NM AS permNm ,PERM_DESC AS permDesc ,PERM_TYPE_CD AS permTypeCd FROM TBPERMBS WHERE PERM_ID IN ( SELECT PERM_ID FROM TBROLEPERMRL WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} ) order by PERM_ID
SELECT PERM_ID AS permId ,PERM_NM AS permNm ,PERM_DESC AS permDesc ,PERM_TYPE_CD AS permTypeCd FROM TBPERMBS WHERE PERM_ID IN (#{permId, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
SELECT ROLE_ID as roleId, MENU_ID as menuId, PERM_ID as permId FROM TBROLEMENURL WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND MENU_ID = #{menuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
